class.name: AudioStreamSynchronized
class.brief_description: Stores multiple sub-[AudioStream]s, which will be played in-sync.
class.description: [AudioStreamSynchronized] can hold multiple streams and play them at the same time. [b]Note:[/b] A stream looping will not affect other streams.

method.name: get_sync_stream
method.description: Returns the [AudioStream] of the given [param stream_index].

method.name: get_sync_stream_volume
method.description: Returns the volume, in decibels, of the stream of the given [param stream_index].

method.name: set_sync_stream
method.description: Sets the [param audio_stream] of the given [param stream_index].

method.name: set_sync_stream_volume
method.description: Sets the volume, in decibels, of the stream of the given [param stream_index].

members.member: Number of streams that will be played back in-sync.

constants.constant: Maximum number of streams that can be in-sync.
